name: Crockpot Steak Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 pound round steak, diced and browned
2 tablespoons beef base granules or paste
recipeInstructions:
1. Put all ingredients except butter and flour in the crockpot.
2. Cover and cook on Low for 8 to 10 hours.
3. One hour before serving, turn the crockpot to High.
4. Make a roux by melting 1 stick of butter in a small saucepan over medium-low heat, then stir in 1/2 cup flour until smooth.
5. Pour the roux into the crockpot and stir it into the soup.
6. Cook the soup on High until thickened.
